hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Start with a variable set to 10 for your balance

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Use a repeat(20) loop for the 20 years

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Inside the loop: generate a random rate from 0 to 10

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: Growth is balance times rate divided by 100 — then add it to your balance

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: After the loop, call checkBalance() with your final balance
